title: Plans
description: Catalog of AlmaPet ID registration fees, annual plans and channel commissions.
search_placeholder: Search by name, code or description...

empty.no_records_description: Create the pricing catalog for registration fees and annual renewals.
empty.no_results_description: No plans match the current filters.

form.description_create: Define the fee or annual plan shown to owners and clinics.
form.description_edit: Update price, commissions, term or plan status.
form.section_basic_hint: Internal code, public price (direct owner) and billing period.
form.section_vetsaas_hint: When signup comes from a VetSaaS tenant. Culqi charges this price; commission goes to the clinic.
form.section_partner_hint: External clinics. Lower commission than VetSaaS so the partner deal stays attractive.

fields.name: Name
fields.amount_hint: What the owner pays when registering directly on AlmaPet (no clinic).
fields.vetsaas_clinic_commission_hint: E.g. S/ 10 of S/ 25 → AlmaPet S/ 15.
fields.partner_clinic_commission_hint: E.g. S/ 5 of S/ 25 → AlmaPet S/ 20.

delete.title: Delete plan
delete.description: You are about to delete {{name}}. Only allowed if it has no related payments.
